data.title: Western Gold Resources Ltd. Announces New Securities Issue to Boost Capital
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Western Gold Resources Ltd. ( (AU:WGR) ) has shared an announcement.

Western Gold Resources Ltd. has announced a proposed issue of 18 million fully paid ordinary securities, with the anticipated issue date set for January 17, 2025. This move is aimed at raising capital, potentially enhancing the company’s operational capabilities and market positioning in the gold mining sector.

More about Western Gold Resources Ltd.

Western Gold Resources Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold resources. As a company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), it engages in activities related to the extraction of valuable minerals, primarily gold, to serve the global markets.

data.title: Therma Bright Announces Debt Settlement Through Shares Issuance
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Therma Bright ( (TSE:THRM) ) has provided an update.

Therma Bright Inc. has announced a debt settlement agreement with a third-party creditor, intending to settle $100,000 in debt through the issuance of 2,000,000 common shares at a price of $0.05 each, pending TSXV approval. This strategic move aims to strengthen Therma Bright’s financial standing, potentially enhancing their market positioning and ensuring greater operational flexibility.

More about Therma Bright

Therma Bright Inc. is a developer and investment partner specializing in advanced diagnostic and medical device technologies. Their focus is on providing innovative solutions to address significant medical and healthcare challenges, catering to both consumers and medical professionals.

data.title: Trans Wonderland Expands Stake in Tolu Minerals
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Tolu Minerals Limited ( (AU:TOK) ) has shared an update.

Trans Wonderland Limited has increased its relevant interest in Tolu Minerals Limited, a company involved in mineral exploration, by purchasing additional shares. As a result of this acquisition, Trans Wonderland’s voting power in Tolu Minerals has slightly decreased despite the increase in shares, now holding 13,686,123 fully paid ordinary shares, equating to an 8.20% voting power. This change in shareholding reflects Trans Wonderland’s strategic move to strengthen its influence within Tolu Minerals.

Immuron Limited ( (AU:IMC) ) just unveiled an update.

An update from Moneta Gold ( (TSE:STLR) ) is now available.

STLLR Gold has published its annual ESG report, highlighting its commitment to sustainable practices and corporate stewardship while progressing its key assets, the Tower and Colomac Gold Projects in Canada. The company aims to develop safe, sustainable gold mines with community collaboration, ensuring benefits for all stakeholders, and emphasizes its dedication to environmental and social responsibilities.

STLLR Gold Inc. is a Canadian gold development company focusing on advancing two major gold projects: the Tower Gold Project in Ontario and the Colomac Gold Project in the Northwest Territories. Both projects are poised for long-term, large-scale operations with significant exploration potential. The company is led by an experienced management team dedicated to rapidly advancing these projects.

WAM Global Ltd. ( (AU:WGB) ) has issued an update.

data.title: Chordia Therapeutics Secures Orphan Drug Designation for Rogocekib in the U.S.
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Chordia Therapeutics Inc. ( (JP:190A) ) has provided an update.

Chordia Therapeutics announced that rogocekib, its CLK inhibitor for the treatment of Refractory or Relapsed Acute Myologic Lymphoma (AML), has been granted Orphan Drug Designation by the FDA in the United States. This designation provides various developmental and financial benefits, including application fee exemptions, tax reductions, and exclusive market rights for seven years post-approval, paving the way for the potential commercialization of rogocekib.

More about Chordia Therapeutics Inc.

Chordia Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biotech company based in Fujisawa, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan, focused on the research and development of novel cancer therapies. Its lead asset, rogocekib, is a CLK inhibitor currently undergoing Phase 1/2 clinical trials in the U.S. The company is also working on other preclinical assets, such as CTX-439, a CDK12 inhibitor, and GCN2 inhibitors.

YTD Price Performance: -1.58%

Average Trading Volume: 7,098,076

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

See more insights into 190A stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Incitec Pivot Limited ( (AU:IPL) ) has shared an announcement.

Incitec Pivot Limited announced an update regarding its ongoing on-market buy-back of its ordinary fully paid shares with the ASX security code IPL. data.title: Hydreight Technologies Reflects on 2024 Successes and 2025 Vision
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Hydreight Technologies Inc ( (TSE:NURS) ) just unveiled an update.

Hydreight Technologies Inc. announced significant milestones achieved in 2024, including the successful launch of VSDHOne, a telemedicine and e-commerce platform that has sold over 200 licenses across all 50 states. This development, along with a 54% increase in Q3 revenue and achieving positive adjusted EBITDA, has strengthened their market position. As they enter 2025, Hydreight aims to leverage VSDHOne to drive growth, positioning themselves as a key player in healthcare innovation by providing scalable and compliant solutions for digital health providers.

More about Hydreight Technologies Inc

Hydreight Technologies Inc. is a rapidly growing mobile clinical network and medical platform provider. The company focuses on innovative telehealth solutions, enabling healthcare businesses to scale efficiently across the United States. Its offerings are designed to provide comprehensive solutions for launching and expanding healthcare brands while navigating regulatory challenges.
